contribution.heading: Contribution split
contribution.hint: Set your share as a percentage (no income needed). Each member's fair share of shared expenses is calculated from these percentages.

contribution.normalizedHint: Percentages don't add up to 100% — shares are normalized proportionally.

insights.title: Insights
insights.unableToLoad: Unable to load insights. Please try again later.
insights.keepTrackingDescription: We'll have insights after a few weeks of data. Keep logging your transactions, and we'll provide personalized recommendations to help you budget better.
insights.pageSubtitle: View and manage all your personalized budget recommendations
insights.failedToLoad: Failed to load insights. Please try again later.
insights.noInsightsYet: No insights available yet. Check back soon for personalized budget recommendations!
insights.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your filters or search terms
insights.allCaughtUpDescription: No new insights at this time. Keep tracking your spending!
insights.spending_increase_desc: Your {categoryName} spending increased by {percent}% this month ({currentAmount} vs {previousAmount} last month). Consider reviewing recent expenses to see if this aligns with your goals.
insights.budget_recommendation_desc: Based on your 3-month average of {average}, consider setting a {budget} budget for {categoryName}. This gives you a comfortable 10% buffer while keeping spending mindful.
insights.unusual_expense_desc: We noticed an unusual {categoryName} expense of {amount} - much higher than your typical {typical}. You might want to review this transaction to make sure everything looks right.
insights.positive_reinforcement_desc: {categoryName}: you're {percent}% under budget this month, saving {savings}. Keep up the excellent work!

settings.title: Settings
settings.exportDescription: Download your financial data for backup or analysis
settings.weeklyDigestDescription: Receive a weekly summary of your spending every Monday
settings.syncDescription: All changes are saved automatically. No manual sync required.
settings.bankLevelEncryption: Your data is protected with bank-level encryption
settings.deleteAccountWarning: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently deleted.
settings.allDataDeleted: All your data including transactions, categories, goals, detected subscriptions, weekly digests, insights, and preferences will be permanently deleted.
settings.exportBeforeDelete: Before proceeding, please make sure you have exported your data using the "Export Transactions (CSV)" button above.
settings.currencyDescription: Choose your preferred currency for all monetary displays
settings.emailReadOnly: Email cannot be changed (from auth provider)
settings.dataSyncDescription: Your data automatically syncs across all your devices in real-time.
settings.failedToLoadProfile: Failed to load profile. Please refresh the page.

onboarding.personalizeDescription: Personalize your experience — or skip and start right away
onboarding.welcomeDescription: Let's get you started with a quick tour
onboarding.step1Title: Track Your Spending in Under 30 Seconds
onboarding.step1Description: Quickly log every expense and income with our intuitive transaction entry. Just tap, enter the amount, pick a category, and you're done. It's that simple!
onboarding.step2Description: Your personalized dashboard shows beautiful visual charts breaking down your spending by category, tracking trends over time, and highlighting your financial patterns at a glance.
onboarding.step3Description: Smart Budget analyzes your spending habits and provides actionable insights to help you optimize your budget, spot unusual expenses, and celebrate your wins.

disclaimer.compact: For educational purposes only — not licensed financial advice.
disclaimer.full: Smart Budget's AI-generated insights, projections, nudges, and recovery plans are provided for educational and informational purposes only. They are not licensed financial advice, and Smart Budget assumes no fiduciary responsibility for decisions made based on them. No outcome is guaranteed. Consult a qualified financial professional before making important financial decisions.
